posts.author: Kanuj5678
posts.community: Interarch: A Proxy Play on India's Infrastructure and CapEx Revival
posts.text: They have little headroom for capacity expansion and projected revenue target of 2100 - 2200 Cr for next year gives about 11-12% growth - if PAT also grows in line and OPM stays same - doesn’t seem exciting.

posts.author: hirakroy123
posts.community: Interarch: A Proxy Play on India's Infrastructure and CapEx Revival
posts.text: Concall highlights: PEB unit in Gujarat and Heavy structure unit (1st phase) in AP will be ready by July-August Capacity will be 40k MTA by FY27 Open web joist system opportunities in North America 1700 cr orderbook will be monetised in 9 months Amid ongoing war steel supply is not disrupted due to company’s strong ties with SAIL, JSW etc Currently, 800-900 orders in pipeline with results be to announced in 60 days 124 cr trade receivable is due to payment delay from larger project Better margins will come from North American market Two good orders from Canada with a total of 35 cr export orde…
